name: distill-locally
description: Local knowledge-distillation study: DeepSeek-R1:8b -> Qwen3-0.6B for structured RSS-article summarization, with a pre-registered multi-judge evaluation.
comment: Fully self-contained: server/eval (compile.mjs, paired_bootstrap.mjs, score.mjs, gen_arms.mjs) uses only Node built-ins + global fetch. No dependencies to install; reproducing the reported metrics needs no API keys.
